landing.badge: ✦ Built for Hair, Skin, Nails, Lashes, Brows, Makeup & Waxing professionals — from solo artists to full-service salons & spas
landing.heroSubtitle: Smart booking, photo-based Customer Relationship Management, retention automation, and our new "Fill My Openings" campaign tool — instantly blast last-minute availability to clients and keep every chair full.
landing.featuresSubtitle: Not just booking — a complete growth automation platform
landing.feature1Desc: Online booking with real-time availability, automatic reminders, and deposit collection. Reduce no-shows by 60%.
landing.feature2Desc: Store before/after photos, nail designs, color formulas, and client preferences. Your complete beauty database.
landing.feature3Desc: Birthday specials, rebooking reminders, loyalty programs, and 'we miss you' campaigns — all automated.
landing.feature4Desc: Masked communications keep client data with the business, not the technician. Protected transitions when staff changes.
landing.feature5Desc: AI-generated posts from client photos, content calendar, ad templates, and review-to-post automation.
landing.feature6Desc: 24/7 chatbot answers questions and books appointments from your website, Instagram, and Facebook.
landing.step1Desc: Enter your service menu with prices, duration, and photos. Takes 5 minutes.
landing.step2Desc: Add it to your Instagram bio, website, and Google profile. Clients book instantly.
landing.step3Desc: Automated reminders, campaigns, and loyalty rewards keep clients coming back.
landing.pricingSubtitle: Start free for 30 days. No credit card required.
landing.ctaSubtitle: Join hundreds of beauty businesses that grow on autopilot with GlowUp.

auth.signInSubtitle: Sign in to manage your beauty business
auth.agreeTerms: By creating an account, you agree to our Terms of Service.
